title: Owner-directed quota recovery and commit landing
body: Masked Stalking Veil 019dfc is taking over owner-directed quota recovery for two Claude sessions. Current index has Umbral Cloaking Silhouette's skills/artefact audit + plans staged; working tree also has Hidden Slipping Moth collaboration-state claim closure edits. I will repair the pending-graduations line typo, commit the staged planning work in sensible chunks by explicit pathspec, commit collaboration-state closure separately, and keep shared-state writes visible. Active claims registry was consulted: no live claims in working copy; HEAD still had Hidden Slipping Moth's expired git:index/head claim, already removed by the pending closure edits.
